title: Claude just dropped UltraCode... Unlock SuperPowers
summary: Claude released UltraCode, a feature that enables code-based orchestration of up to 10 parallel agents without a master LLM. The video tutorial covers implementation patterns including judge panels, adversarial verification, deterministic fan-out, and integration with OpenRouter for dynamic model selection.
writeup: The video walks through Claude's UltraCode, which enables code-based orchestration of up to 10 parallel agents without routing through a master LLM. It covers concrete implementation patterns: judge panels, adversarial verification, deterministic fan-out, and integration with OpenRouter for dynamic model selection. The shift to code-driven coordination matters because it removes a central LLM as the orchestration bottleneck and supports long-running, parallel agent workflows.
